risks.description: The n78 RRH shipment missed port schedule windows, impacting the March installation sequence.
risks.current_status: Partial units were reallocated from the Singapore warehouse; around 70% of demand is now in the Central warehouse.
risks.next_steps: Confirm air-freight for the final 40 RRHs and update the Week 17 MOS plan.

risks.description: Several expansion sites require power-capacity upgrades before On Air.
risks.current_status: Power survey is 89% complete; 11 sites are waiting for the electrical cabinet fabrication contract.
risks.next_steps: Accelerate second-batch PDU procurement and lock installation slots for Weeks 16-17.

risks.description: Some expansion sites in Quang Nam are delayed by local permits for auxiliary pole construction.
risks.current_status: The 12-site list is under review; 6 sites have received supplemental approvals.
risks.next_steps: Coordinate with the provincial telecom authority and prioritize fast-track escalation in Week 18.
